---
description: "Use when editing images, gallery content, alt text, images/, index.html, or public/version.txt for Pigtown Sanctuary. Covers root-level image preservation and people/community content references."
name: "Pigtown Sanctuary Asset Protection"
---
# Pigtown Sanctuary Asset Protection

Apply these instructions whenever editing images, gallery content, alt text, `images/`, or `index.html`.

- Preserve the existing root-level `images/` folder and the image references used by `index.html`.
- Before merge or deploy, confirm `index.html` still references the expected image assets and people-section content.
- Do not rename or move working image files unless Pryce explicitly asks.
- Keep alt text readable and purpose-based, not raw filenames.
